title: eurybia macrophylla var. ianthina
intro: Eurybia macrophylla var. ianthina, also known as the 'Purple Sea Daisy', is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its large, showy purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The Purple Sea Daisy is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
